name: input-with-button
visual_summary: A form input with a button that can be used for submitting or saving form data. This component is suitable when a user needs to provide information and take further action by clicking the attached button.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-with-button
Description: A form input with a button that can be used for submitting or saving form data. This component is suitable when a user needs to provide information and take further action by clicking the attached button.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: form, input, button, wizard, flow

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
